title: Mesh Dashboard
description: Istio data-plane service health, pilot push activity, and the underlying Kubernetes capacity. Mesh deployments always ride on K8s, so the cluster block is folded in.

widgets.title: Istio-managed services
widgets.tip: Services routed through the Istio data plane.

widgets.title: Istio pilot
widgets.tip: xDS push count (cds / eds / lds / rds), reject errors, and proxy push time.

widgets.title: Mesh service topology
widgets.tip: Live service map — same renderer as the per-layer Topology tab, without the detail sidebar.

widgets.title: Active alarms
widgets.tip: All currently firing alarms (layer filter is best-effort in v1).

widgets.title: Cluster capacity & utilisation
widgets.tip: Nodes / namespaces / workloads + cluster-wide CPU, memory, and disk usage.
